title: Malum (Quilt)
description: A Quilt port of the mod Malum - A minecraft mod about dark magic.
body:
This is a **port** developed by RTTV and Arathain of the forge mod Malum by SammySemicolon. The original can be found right here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malum

Malum is a dark magic mod centered around spirit magics, a generally frowned upon and forbidden study of arcana.

![](https://imgur.com/6eKpSMm.png)
